profiles.name: Yadav Sunuwar
profiles.description: Yadav Sunuwar is a master craftsman who leads the entire rug-making process with years of expertise and precision. He carefully oversees design execution, guides the weavers, and ensures each rug meets the highest standards of quality and craftsmanship.

profiles.name: Urmila Moktan
profiles.description: Urmila Moktan is a skilled weaver who brings intricate patterns to life through careful hand-knotting techniques. Her patience and attention to detail ensures every rug carries beauty, balance, and durability.
